title: phacelia cryptantha var. heliophila
intro: Phacelia cryptantha var. heliophila, also known as the desert lily or heliophila, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for topical use, as well as being dried and used in herbal blends for its medicinal properties.
